headline: Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ:FITB) Misses Q1 CY2026 Revenue Estimates
summary: Regional banking company Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ:FITB) missed Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, but sales rose 31% year on year to $2.83 billion. Its GAAP profit of $0.15 per share was 32.2% below analysts’ consensus estimates.
